mapper.sql: p.product_id AS productId, p.merchant_id AS merchantId, COALESCE(mi.store_name, su.real_name, su.username) AS merchantName, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, p.name AS name, p.description AS description, p.price AS price, p.stock AS stock, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.order_count AS orderCount, COALESCE(p.monthly_sales, p.order_count, 0) AS monthlySales, p.rating AS rating, p.tag AS tag, COALESCE(mi.delivery_fee, 3.00) AS deliveryFee, COALESCE(mi.min_order_amount, 0.00) AS minOrderAmount, COALESCE(mi.delivery_time, 30) AS avgDeliveryMinutes
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON p.merchant_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON p.merchant_id = mi.merchant_id WHERE p.status = 1
AND ( p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mi.store_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY COALESCE(p.monthly_sales, p.order_count, 0) DESC, COALESCE(p.rating, 5.0) DESC, p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT , SUM(oi.quantity) AS quantity FROM delivery_order o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON p.merchant_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON p.merchant_id = mi.merchant_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status <> -1 AND p.status = 1 GROUP BY p.product_id, p.merchant_id, mi.store_name, su.real_name, su.username, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.image_url, p.order_count, p.monthly_sales, p.rating, p.tag, mi.delivery_fee, mi.min_order_amount, mi.delivery_time ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC, MAX(o.order_time) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT uc.user_coupon_id AS userCouponId, c.coupon_id AS couponId, c.title AS title, c.amount AS amount, c.min_amount AS minAmount, uc.status AS userCouponStatus, c.end_time AS endTime, CASE WHEN uc.status = 0 AND c.status = 1 AND NOW() BETWEEN c.start_time AND c.end_time THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS available FROM user_coupon uc INNER JOIN coupon c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 0 AND c.status = 1 AND NOW() BETWEEN c.start_time AND c.end_time ORDER BY c.amount DESC, c.min_amount ASC, c.end_time ASC
mapper.sql: o.order_id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.user_id AS userId, o.merchant_id AS merchantId, COALESCE(mi.store_name, mu.real_name, mu.username) AS merchantName, o.rider_id AS riderId, COALESCE(o.rider_name, ru.real_name, ru.username) AS riderName, COALESCE(o.rider_phone, ru.phone) AS riderPhone, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.product_amount AS productAmount, o.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, o.discount_amount AS discountAmount, o.actual_amount AS actualAmount, o.status AS status, CASE o.status WHEN -1 THEN '已取消' WHEN 0 THEN '待商家接单' WHEN 1 THEN '商家已接单' WHEN 2 THEN '已出餐，待骑手接单' WHEN 3 THEN '骑手配送中' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' ELSE '未知状态' END AS statusText, o.order_time AS orderTime, o.merchant_confirm_time AS merchantConfirmTime, o.kitchen_finish_time AS kitchenFinishTime, o.estimated_arrival_time AS estimatedArrivalTime, o.finish_time AS finishTime, o.address AS address, COALESCE(o.required_rider_level, 0) AS requiredRiderLevel, COALESCE(o.required_rider_title, '普通骑手') AS requiredRiderTitle
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM delivery_order o LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON o.merchant_id = mi.merchant_id LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON o.merchant_id = mu.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON o.rider_id = ru.user_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status IN (0, 1, 2, 3) ORDER BY o.order_time DESC, o.order_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM delivery_order o LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON o.merchant_id = mi.merchant_id LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON o.merchant_id = mu.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON o.rider_id = ru.user_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM delivery_order o LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON o.merchant_id = mi.merchant_id LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON o.merchant_id = mu.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON o.rider_id = ru.user_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.order_time DESC, o.order_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT oi.product_id AS productId, p.merchant_id AS merchantId, COALESCE(mi.store_name, su.real_name, su.username) AS merchantName, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, COALESCE(oi.product_name, p.name) AS name, p.description AS description, oi.price AS price, p.stock AS stock, COALESCE(oi.product_image, p.image_url) AS imageUrl, oi.quantity AS quantity, COALESCE(oi.amount, oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotalAmount, COALESCE(mi.delivery_fee, 3.00) AS deliveryFee, COALESCE(mi.min_order_amount, 0.00) AS minOrderAmount, COALESCE(mi.delivery_time, 30) AS avgDeliveryMinutes FROM order_item oi LEFT JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON p.merchant_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON p.merchant_id = mi.merchant_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.item_id ASC

SELECT ri.rider_id AS riderInfoId, ri.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(su.real_name, su.username) AS riderName, su.phone AS phone, ri.status AS status, ri.avg_speed AS avgSpeed, ri.total_finished_count AS totalFinishedCount, ri.rider_level AS riderLevel, ri.rider_title AS riderTitle FROM rider_info ri INNER JOIN sys_user su ON ri.user_id = su.user_id WHERE su.role_type = 3 AND su.status = 1 AND COALESCE(ri.status, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(ri.rider_level, 0) >= COALESCE(#{requiredLevel}, 0) ORDER BY COALESCE(ri.rider_level, 0) DESC, COALESCE(ri.total_finished_count, 0) DESC, ri.rider_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
